hero.title: Daksh ERP
hero.description: A connected ERP ecosystem for billing, purchase, inventory, accounting, GST compliance, dashboards, backup and business intelligence.

home.philosophy_title: Professional enough for accountants. Simple enough for business owners.
home.philosophy_text: Daksh ERP uses a modern workflow-oriented interface to reduce the learning curve and help business owners, staff and accountants work with confidence.
home.ux_subtitle: A modern interface built around how people actually work every day.
home.modules_subtitle: Everything needed to run billing, accounting, inventory and GST workflows in one connected system.
home.invoice_title: Create documents that represent your business.
home.invoice_text: Daksh ERP supports professional invoice layouts for A4, A5, 3 inch thermal and 4 inch thermal printing with GST, QR, branding and numbering controls.
home.workflow_text: Daily transactions flow into inventory, accounting, GST and reports.
home.trust_title: Your business data stays under your control.
home.trust_text: Daksh ERP is designed for local business operations with no mandatory cloud dependency for daily work.
home.final_cta_text: Download the testing build, review the handbook and explore the connected ERP workflow.

features.title: Everything connected for daily business operations
features.subtitle: Detailed module overview for billing, purchase, inventory, accounting, GST, dashboards, backup and intelligence workflows.

invoices.title: Professional Invoice Design Studio
invoices.subtitle: Create documents that represent your business.

accounting.title: Connected Accounting Engine
accounting.subtitle: Daksh ERP connects business operations with accounting records so sales, purchases and payments can update ledgers and reports in a structured way.

intelligence.title: Business Intelligence & AI Simulator
intelligence.subtitle: Understand business health, risks, cashflow, GST impact and practical what-if scenarios using ERP data.

pricing.title: Simple plans for different business stages
pricing.subtitle: Choose the edition that matches your current business workflow.

download.title: Download Daksh ERP
download.subtitle: Get the latest testing build, review system requirements and access the future update channel.

security.title: Security, Backup & Data Protection
security.subtitle: Offline-first control, local data ownership and recovery-ready backup architecture.

industries.title: Built for Indian Businesses
industries.subtitle: Useful for retailers, wholesalers, traders, distributors, accountants, GST practitioners and SMEs.

documentation.title: Daksh ERP Documentation
documentation.subtitle: Read the product handbook and understand the modules, architecture and workflows.

releases.title: Release Notes
releases.subtitle: Track software version history, improvements and update information.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Clear answers about installation, invoices, accounting, GST, backup, licensing and updates.

contact.title: Contact & Support
contact.subtitle: Use the placeholder contact details now and update them later in site configuration.

footer.summary: Offline-first Indian GST ERP for billing, inventory, accounting, GST compliance and business intelligence.
